title: acinos aestivalis
intro: Acinos aestivalis, also known as blue thyme or summer acinos, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of Acinos aestivalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to exhibit antioxidant and antifungal activities. Acinos aestivalis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
